name: Quicksilver Sash

active.name: Quicksilver
active.effects: Removes all {{tip|crowd control}} debuffs (except {{tip|Airborne}}) from your champion (90 second cooldown).

effects_structured.raw: Remove all crowd control debuffs except Airborne.

simpleDescription: Activate to remove all crowd control debuffs

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Quicksilver is a self-activation cleanse with no cast time that removes most crowd-control effects (including suppression and nearsight) but excludes airborne effects.
Player-visible behavior: Quicksilver can be used while stealthed without breaking stealth, but it cannot be activated while airborne.
Follow-up note: page notes indicate cooldown does not transfer between Quicksilver-group items, which should be mirrored in runtime item-group cooldown handling.
Wave 129 (2026-02-25): Backfilled explicit fixed-cooldown active execution timing metadata (`cast_windup_seconds`) for no-cast-time cleanse behavior.
